title: Whisk Udon Bliss
description: A sweet, crunchy indulgent French dish featuring udon noodles with a touch of sweetness from maple syrup and whole30-friendly elements.

ingredients.name: Udon Noodles
ingredients.notes: Use whole grain or gluten-free if necessary

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add udon noodles and cook for 3-4 minutes or until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a blender, combine the cooked udon noodles with maple syrup, lime zest, and cayenne pepper. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Serve immediately as a sweet, crunchy indulgent dessert.
